cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(epd_simulator CXX C)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)

if(MSVC)
  add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
  add_compile_options(/W3 /wd4244 /wd4267 /wd4305)
else()
  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wno-unused-function -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-narrowing)
endif()

set(ROOT "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/..")

# include/build_info.h is normally generated by scripts/embed_html.py as a PlatformIO
# pre-build step, which doesn't run for this CMake build — generate it here too, since
# src/setup_screen.cpp includes it.
execute_process(
  COMMAND git rev-parse --short HEAD
  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${ROOT}
  OUTPUT_VARIABLE GIT_SHA OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE ERROR_QUIET
)
execute_process(
  COMMAND git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD
  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${ROOT}
  OUTPUT_VARIABLE GIT_BRANCH OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE ERROR_QUIET
)
if(GIT_BRANCH STREQUAL "HEAD")
  # Detached HEAD (e.g. CI checkout of a release tag) — show the tag instead
  execute_process(
    COMMAND git describe --tags --exact-match
    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${ROOT}
    OUTPUT_VARIABLE GIT_BRANCH OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE ERROR_QUIET
  )
endif()
if(NOT GIT_SHA)
  set(GIT_SHA "unknown")
endif()
if(NOT GIT_BRANCH)
  set(GIT_BRANCH "unknown")
endif()
execute_process(
  COMMAND git status --porcelain
  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${ROOT}
  OUTPUT_VARIABLE GIT_DIRTY OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE ERROR_QUIET
)
set(DIRTY_SUFFIX "")
if(GIT_DIRTY)
  set(DIRTY_SUFFIX "*")
endif()
string(TIMESTAMP BUILD_TIME_STR "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC" UTC)

file(WRITE "${ROOT}/include/build_info.h"
  "// Auto-generated by simulator/CMakeLists.txt — do not edit\n"
  "#pragma once\n\n"
  "static const char BUILD_INFO[] = \"${GIT_BRANCH}@${GIT_SHA}${DIRTY_SUFFIX}\";\n"
  "static const char BUILD_TIME[] = \"${BUILD_TIME_STR}\";\n"
)

add_executable(simulator
  main_wasm.cpp
  epdiy_pc/epdiy.c
  epdiy_pc/font.c
  # miniz split-file amalgamation (3.x)
  miniz/miniz.c
  miniz/miniz_tdef.c
  miniz/miniz_tinfl.c
  miniz/miniz_zip.c
  qrcodegen/qrcodegen.c
)

target_include_directories(simulator PRIVATE
  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}                           # simulator_stubs.h
  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/esp_stubs                 # esp_attr.h, esp_err.h, qrcode.h, xtensa/
  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/miniz                     # miniz.h and split headers
  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/qrcodegen                 # qrcodegen.h
  ${ROOT}/include                               # config.h, fonts/, images/
  ${ROOT}/src                                   # main.cpp
  ${ROOT}/.pio/libdeps/display/epdiy/src        # epdiy.h, epd_internals.h, epd_highlevel.h
  ${ROOT}/.pio/libdeps/display/ArduinoJson/src  # ArduinoJson.h
)

target_compile_definitions(simulator PRIVATE SIMULATOR_BUILD=1)

if(EMSCRIPTEN)
  set_target_properties(simulator PROPERTIES
    OUTPUT_NAME "simulator"
    SUFFIX ".js"
    RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/wasm"
  )
  target_link_options(simulator PRIVATE
    -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_wasm_init,_wasm_set_config,_wasm_render,_wasm_render_setup,_wasm_get_framebuffer,_wasm_fb_size,_malloc,_free
    -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=ccall,cwrap,HEAPU8,stringToUTF8,lengthBytesUTF8
    -sMODULARIZE=1
    "-sEXPORT_NAME=SimulatorModule"
    -sINITIAL_MEMORY=33554432
    -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1
    -sNO_EXIT_RUNTIME=1
    --no-entry
  )
endif()
